message:
fix(fr-runtime): HELLO option errors use upstream-specific wording [bd-frankenredis-helloopt]

HELLO 3 AUTH (with missing username/password) and HELLO 3 BADKW
(unknown option) were emitting the generic 'ERR syntax error'.
Upstream networking.c::helloCommand emits 'ERR Syntax error in
HELLO option <OPT>' with the (case-preserved) option name for
both unknown options and option-arg shortages.

Also extends the AUTH-credentials path to use the
authenticate_user_by_acl helper (so HELLO 3 AUTH default <any>
succeeds for nopass-default — matches upstream).

Updates fr_p2c_004_u009a_hello_auth_missing_credentials_returns_syntax_error
test to assert on the new wording.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
